one_line: Grounded trap-action concept in rex/scoring.py (TRAP_PENALTY=0.60, _traps_in, per-trap why feedback) + 51/51 scenario YAMLs; researched SREGym/AIOpsLab/ITBench (all end-state 'resolved?' oracles, no trap labels) and Safe-RL precedent; generated a 51-record trap_taxonomy.json (6 passing tests) + comparison report with a scoped novelty claim (per-incident mechanism-conditional trap labeling + graded penalty + NL feedback) and honest limitations (48/51 traps are scale_deployment).
